mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO field_config ( module_code, field_code, field_label, field_type, data_type, options_json, is_required, order_no, status, field_length, is_default, display_order, field_group, field_group_name, creator, create_time, updater, update_time, deleted, tenant_id ) VALUES
( #{item.moduleCode}, #{item.fieldCode}, #{item.fieldLabel}, #{item.fieldType}, #{item.dataType}, #{item.optionsJson}, #{item.isRequired}, #{item.orderNo}, #{item.status}, #{item.fieldLength}, #{item.isDefault}, #{item.displayOrder}, #{item.fieldGroup}, #{item.fieldGroupName}, #{item.creator}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updater}, #{item.updateTime}, #{item.deleted}, #{item.tenantId} )
